qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Reflected XSS in RSS feed title via username parameter
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies XSS in RSS feed endpoints (news_rss.php:88, issues_rss.php:116) via unsanitized username query parameter concatenation. The advisory describes a different vulnerability: stored HTML injection from tag names in the Timeline view (my_view_page.php) due to missing escaping in IssueTagTimelineEvent::html(). Different vulnerable function, different file, different root cause, different sink (RSS title concatenation vs Timeline tag display).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Stored XSS in RSS feed via malicious filter name
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies stored XSS via unsanitized filter names concatenated into RSS feed titles (issues_rss.php:120). The advisory describes stored XSS from unsanitized tag names in the Timeline view (my_view_page.php, IssueTagTimelineEvent::html()). Although both are stored XSS in the same broad CWE family, the vulnerable components, files, functions, and root causes are entirely different: filter names from the database in RSS feeds vs tag names from History in the Timeline.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory describes stored HTML injection/XSS from unescaped tag names in the Timeline view (my_view_page.php) with root cause in IssueTagTimelineEvent::html() where $this->tag_name is not passed through string_html_specialchars(). The two RSS XSS findings target different endpoints (news_rss.php, issues_rss.php) with different root causes (unsanitized username parameter and unsanitized filter name from database). Surface-level similarity in vulnerability class (stored XSS) between the advisory and vuln_rss_filtername_xss is insufficient — the vulnerable code, root cause, and affected component are entirely different.
evidence: Advisory root cause: IssueTagTimelineEvent::html() does not escape $this->tag_name with string_html_specialchars() in my_view_page.php Timeline display
Advisory patch commit f32787c14d4518476fe7f05f992dbfe6eaccd815 adds string_html_specialchars() call around $this->tag_name
vuln_rss_username_xss targets news_rss.php:88 and issues_rss.php:116 — username parameter concatenation into RSS title, not tag display in Timeline
vuln_rss_filtername_xss targets issues_rss.php:120 — filter name from database concatenated into RSS title, not tag name from History in Timeline
